summary: Iteration 189: Tested Register Page V2 design unification with Login Page, auth flows, and marketplace boundary enforcement. All 11 backend tests passed. All 17 frontend tests passed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Register page V2 now matches Login page V2 with modern split-panel design. All auth flows working. Boundary enforcement verified - no /account/* links on public pages.
